code:
import io
import string
import list

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line1)
mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut i = 0
while i < tokens.len()
  let t = match tokens.get(i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    ""
  end
  match string.parse_int(t)
  when Some(n)
    nums = list.push(nums, n)
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

let k = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
when Some(n)
  n
when None
  0
end

let total = nums.len()
mut a = nums
mut p = 0
while p < total
  mut q = 0
  while q < total - 1 - p
    let x = match a.get(q)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    let y = match a.get(q + 1)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if x < y
      mut new_list: List<Int> = []
      mut r = 0
      while r < total
        if r == q
          new_list = list.push(new_list, y)
        else if r == q + 1
          new_list = list.push(new_list, x)
        else
          let v = match a.get(r)
          when Some(vv)
            vv
          when None
            0
          end
          new_list = list.push(new_list, v)
        end
        r = r + 1
      end
      a = new_list
    end
    q = q + 1
  end
  p = p + 1
end

let take = if k > total
  total
else
  k
end

mut out = ""
mut j = 0
while j < take
  let v = match a.get(j)
  when Some(vv)
    vv
  when None
    0
  end
  if j == 0
    out = "#{v}"
  else
    out = "#{out} #{v}"
  end
  j = j + 1
end
println(out)
